chunks.text: 1 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Appl. No.S-499 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE. 1. For orders on O/objection at flag-A. 2. For hearing of pre-arrest bail. 10.07.2025 Mr. Ali Murad Malano, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Addl. Prosecutor General *************** Learned Counsel for applicant submits certified copy of order under the cover of his statement dated 10.07.2025 and states that applicant/accused Waheed Akhtar son of Abdul Rasheed has been acquitted by way of compromise u/s 345 Cr.P.C, vide order dated 30.06.2025 passed by Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate-I, Ubauro, therefore, he expresses his satisfaction and does not wish to press instant bail application. Learned Addl.P.G, affirms the contentions of learned counsel for applicant and submits that this bail application has become infructuous. In view of above, instant bail application stands dismissed having become infructuous. J U D G E Ihsan/PS
